channel.title: p(Doom)1 dev blog
channel.description: Development notes from p(Doom)1 - a satirical strategy game about managing an AI safety lab.

item.title: Where the site stands, before the refresh
item.description: A deliberate 'before' snapshot of pdoom1.com at the start of a UI refresh - what's working (the Risk Dashboard), what reads as dated (blanket monospace, no shared layout spine), and the correctness bugs fixed the same day.

item.title: Website Development Sprint Complete: v0.2.0 Major Enhancement
item.description: Completed comprehensive 6-hour development sprint delivering major website enhancements across three phases: game asset integration, blog system overhaul, and UI polish. Transformed the website from a basic landing page into a professional developer showcase.

item.title: Architecture Revolution: From Monolith to Modular Excellence
item.description: A comprehensive look at our systematic approach to breaking down 4,235+ line monoliths into clean, maintainable modules - featuring real metrics and engineering insights from the trenches

item.title: UI Monolith Breakdown Complete - Architecture Transformation
item.description: Completed systematic breakdown of 4,235-line UI monolith into 8 specialized modules, achieving 37.1% reduction with zero functionality regression

item.title: Multi-Repository Integration System Complete
item.description: Completed comprehensive multi-repository integration system establishing professional automation and documentation management across pdoom1, pdoom1-website, and pdoom-data repositories with zero-manual-overhead release process.

item.title: Monolith Breakdown: Tutorial Extraction & Legacy Cleanup
item.description: Extracted 486 lines of tutorial functions, removed 151 lines of legacy code, and fixed critical hover tooltips bug

item.title: Complete Deterministic RNG System v0.6.0
item.description: MAJOR MILESTONE: Transform P(Doom) into fully deterministic competitive gaming platform with perfect reproducibility

item.title: p(Doom)1 Website Release - Deployment Infrastructure Complete
item.description: Successfully implemented and documented the complete deployment pipeline for the p(Doom)1 website with GitHub Actions workflow

item.title: Enhanced Leaderboard System v0.4.1: Seed Competition
item.description: Major competitive gaming milestone: seed-specific leaderboards, lab name integration, bootstrap economic model, and comprehensive session tracking

item.title: P(Doom) v0.3.0: Consolidated Feature Release
item.description: Major consolidated release featuring longtermist 5-digit year dates, accessibility framework, comprehensive bug sweep plan, and systematic branch merge for alpha readiness

item.title: Debug Console System
item.description: Added real-time debug console with backtick toggle for game state monitoring

item.title: P(Doom) v0.2.12: Development Infrastructure
item.description: Major version release featuring comprehensive type annotations and development tooling infrastructure

item.title: Type Annotation Sprint: game_state.py Near Completion
item.description: Completed 85-90% of game_state.py type annotations with 25+ methods annotated across core systems

item.title: Major Type Annotation Milestone: UI and GameState Complete
item.description: Completed comprehensive type annotations for ui.py and 60% of game_state.py, resolving 1,100-1,600 pylance issues
